title: Home-loop beat separation phase
summary: Lane 4 should separate nursery and home-loop payoffs into cleaner beats so plant state, ecological reflection, and utility or reward are not all fighting for the same card.

execution_order.why_now: The home loop is trying to surface too many ideas in one place.

execution_order.goal: Implement one beat-separation pass for nursery interaction state.
execution_order.why_now: The player should read one idea at a time when returning home.
The home loop should feel cleaner, not thinner.
Utility or reward should not be buried inside the most crowded card.

execution_order.goal: Implement one compact reward-surfacing seam outside the crowded nursery card.
execution_order.why_now: The home-loop payoff should become easier to see and feel.
The home loop should feel more satisfying without growing a new dashboard.

guardrails: No new dashboard, inventory, or larger home-base shell.
Avoid putting every beat back into a single text card.
Keep the station and nursery calm, compact, and readable.

main_277_focus.copy_goal: make the bed card read as one dominant home-loop beat at a time by letting selected bed focus suppress route-facing payoff

recommended_live_proof.comparison_state: selected card stays bench or compost

implementation_shape: Add one tiny pure helper that decides whether the selected active bed should suppress route-support payoff.
While the bed is selected and active, keep the bed-local stage beat and suppress the route-support strip.
When the active bed is mature and selected, prefer memorySummary over rewardSummary on the bed card.
Leave no-active-bed and non-bed selection states unchanged so scout/main 278 can choose the cleaner reward seam next.
guardrails: Do not add a new surface for the reward in this pass.
Do not rewrite authored rewardSummary strings.
Do not widen the nursery page or lane-1 renderer split.

main_278_focus.copy_goal: surface one clear home-loop payoff outside the bed by letting the compost notice prefer the authored utility line once crowberry utility is unlocked
implementation_shape: Reuse the existing selected-compost Enter action in game.ts instead of adding a new row or panel.
When nurseryState.utilityNote exists, use that authored line as the compost notice body.
When the utility reward is not unlocked, keep the current generic compost-rate notice unchanged.
guardrails: Only affect the compost notice path.
Do not move route-support guidance onto the bench in this pass.
Do not widen the nursery layout or add another persistent text seam.
